description: Shared preset: group the homelab/ci-components component pins into one soaked MR. Extend with `local>example-org/renovate:ci-components` instead of copying the rule per repo.

packageRules.description: CI/CD components - track the homelab/ci-components @version pins in the include block. The gitlabci manager collapses every `component: source.example.com/homelab/ci-components/<name>@<ver>` line to a single homelab/ci-components dep (gitlab-tags datasource), so one grouped MR bumps all of them together. A short soak lets a fresh component release settle; CI proves the pipeline still renders before merge.
